name: Combobox
description: An input widget with an associated popup (listbox, grid, tree, or dialog) that helps users set a value by selecting from a collection of possible values, supporting editable and select-only variants.

keyboard_interactions.action: Opens popup if closed; moves focus to first item or item after auto-selected suggestion
(Optional) Opens popup and places focus on the last item
Dismisses the popup if visible; optionally clears the value
Accepts the current autocomplete suggestion or selected value
(Optional) Displays the popup without moving focus into it
(Optional) Closes the popup or returns focus to combobox

roles.description: Identifies the element as a combobox

required_attributes.description: false when popup is hidden; true when visible

optional_attributes.description: Set to 'grid', 'tree', or 'dialog' if popup is not a listbox
References the focused element in the popup when DOM focus remains on combobox

notes: The combobox is one of the most complex ARIA patterns — test thoroughly with screen readers
Popup type can be listbox, grid, tree, or dialog — listbox is most common
For select-only comboboxes, type-ahead character matching should be supported
